use_cases: Displaying a grid-based loading animation while images load in web applications
Creating visually engaging image placeholder transitions for media-heavy platforms
Adding polished loading states to image galleries in SaaS and e-commerce applications
ai_summary: A grid-based image loader component that displays animated cells (circles or squares) during the loading state, then transitions to reveal the loaded image with fade effects. Features configurable grid size, cell shapes, colors, blink speeds, and transition durations. Ideal for enhancing user experience during image loading in media, e-commerce, and SaaS platforms.
